questions.question: How many blue balls should reach the end before any red balls are released?
hints: The first register releases blue balls
It counts down and triggers red release on the 6th ball

questions.question: What starting value should the left register (blue ball counter) be set to in order to release 6 blue balls?
hints: If starting value is 5, 5 balls pass through and the 6th triggers red release
This is because value counts down from 5

questions.question: What starting value should the right register (red ball counter) be set to in order to let 3 red balls through before intercepting?
hints: With starting value 3, 3 red balls pass through and the 4th is intercepted

questions.question: Describe the complete pattern of balls released (ball colors in order)
questions.expected_answer: 6 blue balls, then 3 red balls, then intercept
hints: Final red ball goes to interceptor
